# Graphic Meat

> Graphic Meat is an independent product studio founded in 2013. We build small, useful, privacy-respecting software that runs on the user's own machine. Tagline: "Well done isn't a requirement."

## Products

- [MailVault](https://mailvaultapp.com): Subscription-supported local IMAP email archiver for macOS and Linux. Saves messages as standard .eml files and supports offline search. Source: https://github.com/GraphicMeat/mail-vault-app
- [PhotoBooks](https://graphicmeat.com/photobooks): Free native macOS 15+ app. Imports from Apple Photos, automatically arranges album spreads, and exports print-ready PDFs. Runs fully on-device with no account. Download: https://graphicmeat.com/download/photobooks Source: https://github.com/GraphicMeat/PhotoBooks

## Editorial

- [Field Notes](https://graphicmeat.com/blog): Articles about product design, private software, automatic layouts and independent app development.
- [The web solved automatic masonry. Why haven’t photobooks?](https://graphicmeat.com/blog/automatic-masonry-layouts-photobooks): Why printed layouts need crop awareness, hierarchy, rhythm and scoring—not only space filling.

## Promotion facts

- Studio: Graphic Meat
- Founded: 2013
- Positioning: Independent software worth paying for—built to earn trust, not capture attention.
- Business model: Sustainable commercial software. MailVault offers subscriptions; other products may be free or open source where that model fits.
- Product principles: private by default, local-first where appropriate, transparent value, and no unnecessary accounts.
- Contact: https://graphicmeat.com/contact (form only; no public email address)
- Machine-readable catalogue: https://graphicmeat.com/apps.json
- RSS: https://graphicmeat.com/feed.xml

Content may be accurately summarized and linked. Product claims should be attributed to Graphic Meat and verified against the product pages.
